mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, name AS name, email AS email, nickname AS nickname, password AS password, birth_date AS birthDate, tel AS tel, is_foreigner AS isForeigner FROM users WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verify (email, purpose, code_hash, expires_at) VALUES ( #{email}, #{purpose}, SHA2(#{plainCode}, 256), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireMin} MINUTE) ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE code_hash = VALUES(code_hash), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), created_at = NOW()
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM email_verify WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND purpose = #{purpose} AND code_hash = SHA2(#{inputCode}, 256) AND expires_at >= NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT email, purpose, code_hash AS codeHash, expires_at AS expiresAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM email_verify WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND purpose = #{purpose} LIMIT 1
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM email_verify WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND purpose = #{purpose} AND expires_at >= NOW() LIMIT 1 )

SELECT CASE WHEN expires_at >= NOW() THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, NOW(), expires_at) ELSE NULL END AS remainingSeconds FROM email_verify WHERE LOWER(email) = LOWER(#{email}) AND purpose = #{purpose} LIMIT 1
